problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to it, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
